name: s5-capability-schema
description: Spike S5 — Cross-Vendor Capability Schema. Standalone, throwaway prototype (SPEC-OPSBENCH-001 Part 1 §8, Part 2 §1 S5). Proves observability/1 expresses real investigation queries across Datadog, Grafana(Prometheus/Loki) and New Relic with zero agent-facing schema change on backend swap.
